prompt: Commit this. I updated the post-edit-verify hook so it now runs eslint in the loop (after prettier, before typecheck). I also edited the implement-submodule spoke prompt to front-load contract nuances. No src/, test, or exports-map changes.

assertions.text: Subject line starts with 'chore:' in lowercase
Subject line is 70 characters or fewer
A body is present (this chore has a non-obvious why)
Body includes a semver impact statement ('no semver impact', 'zero semver impact', or equivalent)
Body includes a Co-Authored-By footer with noreply@anthropic.com
